source_pr.title: *: Add row count field in a job, fix a drop schema bug and pass race

symptoms: *: Add row count field in a job, fix a drop schema bug and pass race
failure_signature: *: Add row count field in a job, fix a drop schema bug and pass race
root_cause_explanation: The test suite was flaky under the race detector because DDL workers invoke hook callbacks (OnChanged/OnJobUpdated/OnBgJobUpdated) concurrently while tests update `d.hook` or rely on hook state without synchronization. This PR stabilizes it by introducing `hookMu`-protected helper methods (e.g., `setHookWithLock`, `hookOnChangeWithLock`) and locking around hook callback invocations.
fix_pattern: Guard shared DDL hook/callback state with a mutex; use locked setters and wrappers when invoking hooks from worker goroutines to satisfy -race.

evidence: evidence: *: Add row count field in a job, fix a drop schema bug and pass race
